'''Chang''' was a member of [[Elscol Loro]]'s [[Cilpar]]-based resistance in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].

He carried a [[Flamethrower|flame projector]] as a weapon, and participated in the brief funeral of [[Gates Harnik]]. He then cremated the corpse to prevent the [[Ronk/Legends|ronks]] from getting it.

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 1|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 1]] {{1st}}
